heading: Authorization of appropriation
label: 428m Authorization of appropriation
text: There is authorized to be appropriated the sum of not to exceed $454,000 for the purpose of acquiring lands, interests in lands, and improvements thereon as may be necessary for carrying out sections 428k to 428 of this title.o
notes: Amendments1972— increased authorization of appropriations from a sum not to exceed $226,000 to a sum not to exceed $454,000.Pub. L. 92–272
amendments: Amendments1972— increased authorization of appropriations from a sum not to exceed $226,000 to a sum not to exceed $454,000.Pub. L. 92–272
